title: Naked and Afraid
subTitle: Laura Zerra mentors a blacksmith and a former MMA fighter as they attempt to survive 21 days in Yucatan, facing daunting challenges like scarce food resources, deadly crocodiles and violent storms.

title: Naked and Afraid
subTitle: Two foreigners try to become the first survivalists to endure 21 days on US soil. But rattlesnakes and plummeting temperatures threaten to send them home.

title: Naked And Afraid Latam
subTitle: Participants face the ultimate endurance challenge as they attempt to survive in wild terrains, battling unpredictable weather, scarce resources and physical exhaustion.

title: Naked and Afraid
subTitle: Two superfans take on Mexico's Yucatan jungle for 14 days. However, they have to rely on sheer grit to battle brutal storms, vampire bats and unrelenting hunger.

title: Marooned With Ed Stafford
subTitle: Encircled by raging forest fires, Ed Stafford struggles to survive in the arid savannah and dense jungles along Colombia's Orinoco River.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls shows how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels and avoid frostbite in order to survive Iceland's extreme conditions.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls travels across Kenya to demonstrate how to survive the African savannah.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls enters the heart of Dracula country - the forests of Transylvania - where he encounters steep ravines, cavernous underground water systems and a brown bear.

title: Gold Rush
subTitle: With Parker in Alaska, Tyson risks bringing in new recruits to get Slucifer back on the gold. Plus, Tony's Westchester crew calls in a favour that pays off big time.

subTitle: Bear falls onto a glacier and squeezes through an ice cave to escape. Later, he stumbles upon a mine that could help him find his way out of the mountains.

subTitle: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges, making a bow and arrow, and showing which plants are poisonous.
